title: XYZ Anti Block Rotation
description: texture pack for donutsmp anti rotation rotation
body:
XYZ Anti Block Rotation

Think your base is safe? Rotation patterns might say otherwise… unless you’re using this.

XYZ Anti Block Rotation modifies directional block visuals to remove any rotation-based clues, making it impossible for others to track or locate hidden bases using block orientation. From every angle, blocks like deepslate and ores appear consistent and give nothing away.

Designed to keep ores clear and easy to recognize, so you get full protection without sacrificing visibility.

Works on all Minecraft clients and launchers, with full support for versions 1.20 and above.

Ideal for anarchy and competitive servers where staying hidden is the difference between surviving and getting wiped.

More updates coming soon.
